altText: A big droopy pawpaw leaf held in a hand, widest near the tip
Large tropical-looking pawpaw leaves hanging from a branch
Fresh spring pawpaw leaves unfolding along a branch
A deep maroon pawpaw flower hanging under the branch
Two dark red pawpaw bells dangling in the spring woods
Ripe green pawpaw fruits with dark speckles among fallen leaves
A young green pawpaw fruit still hanging on the tree
A young pawpaw with its big leaves spreading in the forest understory
A pawpaw patch growing thick along a riverbank
Smooth grey-brown pawpaw trunk with pale speckles
